content: agent2: implementing feat(i18n) ConditionalI18nExtension (ctrans tag) in src/jinja2/ext.py. Will only touch src/jinja2/ext.py. Let me know if you're touching that file too.

ack — I'll add a new class ConditionalI18nExtension right after InternationalizationExtension (before ExprStmtExtension) plus the module-level alias near the bottom. Shouldn't overlap with your parse()/_make_node() edits inside InternationalizationExtension. Will ping before I finalize.

Checked my working tree: your InternationalizationExtension trans_metadata changes aren't present here (each of us appears to have a separate repo copy despite the shared paths in our messages — no merge conflicts markers, no diff for that class shows up on my side). My patch.txt only contains ConditionalI18nExtension (added as a new class after InternationalizationExtension, plus the conditional_i18n module alias at the bottom) — 830 tests pass. You'll need to write your own patch.txt in your own workspace with your diff; I can't see or include your edits from here.
